headline: Developer-community business development leader connecting technology companies with developer audiences

confidenceNote: Company team page and LinkedIn public profile/search evidence align on name, employer, and business-development role; location was not verified from strong public sources.

headline: Cloud data strategy and architecture leader focused on Snowflake-centered analytics platforms
title: CEO
confidenceNote: Personal site, company team page, LinkedIn, and conference bio consistently identify Bernie Pruss with Cloud Data Consulting and senior data leadership; exact title varies between CEO, Founder, and Chief Data Solutions Architect.
bioMarkdown: CEO and senior data architect at Cloud Data Consulting, helping teams design Snowflake-centered data platforms, analytics engineering workflows, governance practices, and business-ready data models.

primary.label: Bernie Pruss personal site
primary.note: Personal site says he runs Cloud Data Consulting and works on data architectures with Snowflake, dbt, and Coalesce.

primary.label: Cloud Data Consulting team page
primary.note: Company page lists Bernie Pruss as Founder and Chief Data Solutions Architect and says the company is headquartered in Denver.

primary.label: LinkedIn profile
primary.note: Public profile/search result describes him as Founder and Chief Data Architect at Cloud Data Consulting.

secondary.label: INFORMS Analytics 2024 speaker profile
secondary.note: Conference bio lists him as CEO and Chief Data Solutions Architect at Cloud Data Consulting with decades of data-systems experience.

secondary.label: Cloud Data Consulting LinkedIn company page
secondary.note: Company profile describes Cloud Data Consulting as Denver-based IT consulting focused on data supply chains.

headline: Product leader building developer tools, agent infrastructure, observability, and MCP ecosystem tooling

headline: Mortgage technology founder building rules-based loan decisioning and pricing infrastructure
title: Founder/ CEO
confidenceNote: LoanPASS, BlockGen, LinkedIn, and HousingWire sources consistently identify Bill Roy as founder/CEO tied to LoanPASS and Miami; career details are well supported by company and industry profiles.
bioMarkdown: Founder and CEO of LoanPASS, a mortgage-technology company building configurable loan decisioning and pricing tools for lenders. Longtime housing and financial-services operator with capital-markets, mortgage-tech, and fintech leadership experience.

primary.label: LoanPASS announcement
primary.note: Company announcement identifies Bill Roy as LoanPASS founder and CEO and describes the company's rules-based loan decisioning engine.

primary.label: BlockGen team page
primary.note: Company leadership page lists Bill Roy as Founder and CEO of BlockGen, with LoanPASS as a subsidiary, and gives career background.

primary.label: LinkedIn profile
primary.note: Public profile/search result identifies him as Founder and CEO of LoanPASS.

secondary.label: HousingWire Vanguard profile
secondary.note: Industry award profile describes him as LoanPASS founder and CEO and summarizes his mortgage-tech and investment career.

headline: AI engineer applying LLMs, generative AI, and research engineering to clinical and scientific workflows
title: Principal AI Engineer
confidenceNote: LinkedIn strongly matches name, InsightRX, title, and location; additional career detail comes from The Org, Mila, and publication sources, with The Org marked unverified.
bioMarkdown: Principal AI Engineer at InsightRx in the Greater Montreal area, working at the intersection of applied AI, LLMs, generative systems, and healthcare/precision-dosing workflows. Prior public research traces connect them to Mila and machine-learning work on generative flow networks.

primary.label: LinkedIn profile
primary.note: Public profile lists Bi Lun Sun as Principal AI Engineer at InsightRX, located in the Greater Montreal Metropolitan Area, with University of Waterloo listed.

primary.label: Mila directory
primary.note: Mila directory lists Bilun Bi Lun Sun as alumni.

primary.label: Google Scholar profile
primary.note: Scholar profile for Bilun Sun shows AI publications and a verified Mila affiliation.

secondary.label: The Org profile
secondary.note: Unverified org profile lists Bi Lun Sun as Principal AI Engineer at InsightRX and summarizes LLM, generative AI, Riskfuel, Mila, and Kindroid background.

secondary.label: arXiv publication
secondary.note: Machine-learning paper lists Bilun Sun as a coauthor on expected flow networks and GFlowNets research.

secondary.label: InsightRX LinkedIn activity
secondary.note: Company activity describes InsightRX's precision-dosing platform and AI-agent direction.
